{
    /// <summary>Generated by DwarfMapper — maps <c>global::Demo.Src</c> to <c>global::Demo.Dst</c>.</summary>
    /// <remarks>Mapping plan:<list type="bullet">
    /// <item><description>Age &lt;- Age</description></item>
    /// </list></remarks>
    public partial global::Demo.Dst Map(global::Demo.Src s)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(s);
        OnBefore(s);
        var __dwarf_target = new global::Demo.Dst
        {
            Age = s.Age,
        };
        OnAfter(s, __dwarf_target);
        return __dwarf_target;
